creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
I reviewed the patch. Mostly it's fine. I think since now Telegram/SourceFiles/core/update_checker.cpp already checks for Q_OS_UNIX, our patch can be simply reverted. Anyway we don't care about the auto updater.
It's great that they are making the code to work unchanged on non-Linux unix-like systems. A lot of FreeBSD-specific patches can be removed.
